title: Donning and Removing PPE (Gown and Gloves)

steps.detailedTagText: Face the back opening of the gown.
Secure the neck opening at the back of neck.
Secure the waist, making sure that the back flaps overlap each other and cover clothing as completely as possible.

steps.clinicalNote: Use clean, non-sterile gloves for isolation care.

steps.detailedTagText: Ensure the gloves overlap the gown sleeves at the wrist.
steps.examScorecard: Technique: Gloves overlap gown cuffs at wrist

steps.detailedTagText: When the care is complete and before leaving the room, remove the gloves BEFORE removing the gown.
steps.clinicalNote: Sequence matters: gloves off before gown, before leaving the room — evaluator watches for this order.
steps.examScorecard: Safety: Remove gloves BEFORE gown; BEFORE leaving room

steps.detailedTagText: Remove the gloves, turning them inside out.
subSteps: Grasp outside of first glove at palm; peel off
Slide fingers of bare hand under cuff of remaining glove at wrist; peel off turning inside out
steps.examScorecard: Technique: Both gloves removed inside out

steps.detailedTagText: Dispose of the gloves in the appropriate container.
steps.examScorecard: Safety: Dispose without touching outer glove surface

steps.clinicalNote: ⚠️ VIDEO WARNING: This step is missing from the reference video — video performs hand hygiene only after gown disposal. GWC requires it HERE, between glove removal and gown unfastening.
steps.examScorecard: Safety: Hand hygiene between gloves-off and gown-off

steps.detailedTagText: Unfasten the gown at the neck.
steps.examScorecard: Technique: Unfasten neck before removing gown

steps.detailedTagText: Unfasten the gown at the waist.
steps.examScorecard: Technique: Unfasten waist separately from neck

steps.detailedTagText: Remove the gown starting at the top of the shoulders, turning it inside out and folding the soiled area to soiled area.
subSteps: Turn inside out as you remove
Fold soiled area to soiled area
Hold away from body; do not touch floor
steps.examScorecard: Technique: Remove from shoulders; inside out; soiled-to-soiled

steps.detailedTagText: Dispose of the gown in an appropriate container.

steps.examScorecard: Safety: Final hand hygiene after full PPE removal
